stemHtml: Which statement most accurately describes a decluttered display on a HUD?

options.a: Indications are less visible on the screen.
options.b: The decluttered indications are typical of those you can find on the PFD.
options.c: Indications can be just shown as numbers at various unusual places on the HUD, that don’t necessarily respect the typical instrumentation conventions.
options.d: The declutter function replaces some standard values by decluttered ones.
